what_it_does: A fully deterministic (no-model) intake that reads the 18 stubborn-floor entries from .build/rg10/reconciled.json, derives a prefix->area map from the real feature inventory (design/register.json), and for each gap proposes a feature row {id, area, label, code:''} — flagging rows that fail the floor checks (id shape, area derivable, no collision with a real id, non-empty label). It merges within-batch duplicates (same id from multiple surface elements -> one feature carrying multiple ui_addresses), writes each gap's proposed_feature back into reconciled.json in place, and returns counts plus the proposed rows. It proposes only; register.json is untouched.
observations: DETERMINISTIC end-to-end, framed in the docstring as 'the strongest form of the no-fiction floor: every field derives from data that exists'.
prefix->area map is DERIVED from the real inventory (registry-is-truth): an ambiguous prefix (top area not 100% of occurrences) maps to None and FLAGS rather than guessing.
Floor checks: id regex ^[A-Z]+-[a-z][a-z_-]*$, no collision with real_ids (a collision is flagged as 'a reconcile miss'), area resolvable, label non-empty.

label is the at-altitude prose (howto.what), falling back to represents only when it is real prose and not the id echo — with an inline note that the first run mislabelled every row with its own id, caught by look-at-output.
Within-batch merge: same id from multiple elements collapses to one proposed feature with sorted unique ui_addresses; representative label is the longest (most specific) prose.
Writes reconciled.json in place (the walk's stop-3 artifact is the truth the surface reads); PROPOSES ONLY — Tim's stop-3 verdict authorizes any inventory growth.
Returns gaps count, proposed_features count, flagged list with reasons, by_area counter, and the merged rows.
Described as GC9, the registry-filling pattern's SECOND instance, pointed at the feature inventory itself.
standouts: No model anywhere — every proposed field is derived from existing data, making it the no-fiction floor in its purest form.
Ambiguity flags, never guesses: an unknown/ambiguous prefix yields area=None and a FLAGGED status with an explicit reason ('an invented area would be fiction').
Encodes a caught past bug as a comment (every row labelled with its own id, caught by look-at-output) and the fix (prose-over-id-echo label rule).
conventions: Registry-is-truth (prefix->area derived from the live inventory), propose->gate (writes proposals, never the inventory), fail-loud/flag-don't-guess.
Update-in-place into the walk's stop-3 artifact (reconciled.json).
dict return + json.dumps(main()) in __main__ — the standard script-as-callable shape.
concerns: Reads reconciled.json and writes it back wholesale (json.dump after mutating in place) — no backup/atomicity, so a crash mid-write could corrupt the stop-3 artifact the surface reads.
The prefix->area derivation requires 100% purity for a confident map; a single mis-areaed real feature under a prefix forces that whole prefix to None (flags otherwise-valid gaps).
notes: Deterministic, no-model intake that turns RG10's stubborn-floor gaps into proposed feature rows (area derived from the real inventory, ambiguity flagged not guessed), merged by id and written back into reconciled.json as proposals only.
questions: What produces the 18 stubborn-floor entries and the 'maps_to_feature' the model insisted on (the upstream RG10 reconcile step)?
How does the stop-3 surface consume the proposed_feature fields, and how is Tim's verdict applied to promote them into register.json?
Is there any guard against concurrent writers to reconciled.json given the wholesale rewrite?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — docstring promises a deterministic, proposes-only, registry-derived intake that flags rather than guesses, and the code implements exactly that with no model call.
apparent_themes: No-fiction floor (every field derives from existing data)
Registry-is-truth (area map derived from the inventory)
Insistence-under-correction as the gap signal (the gap-pressure law's instance 2)
Look-at-output discipline encoded as a fix
intention_signals: Trying to convert real gap signals (feature ids the model insisted on through correction) into well-formed, inventory-consistent feature proposals entirely deterministically, so the inventory can grow from evidence with zero fabrication and only Tim's verdict authorizing the actual addition.
novelty: A registry-growth intake that uses zero model inference — deriving the classification (area) purely from the existing registry's own prefix distribution and refusing to proceed where that derivation is ambiguous.
contribution: Contributes the deterministic gap->proposed-feature intake for the feature inventory: the registry-derived area resolution, the flag-don't-guess floor, the same-id merge into multi-address features, and the in-place reconciled.json proposal writes.
summary_for_embedding: A deterministic no-model Python intake that turns RG10 stubborn-floor gaps into proposed feature rows with inventory-derived areas, flagging ambiguous ones, merging duplicate ids, and writing proposals back into reconciled.json.
intention_for_embedding: To grow the feature inventory from real gap signals without fabrication — proposing inventory-consistent feature rows deterministically and flagging anything not derivable, leaving the actual addition to Tim's verdict.
